12.09.77 -- 3 of 11 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS DEPARTMENT OF PERSONNEL AND TRAINING NOTIFICATION New Delhi 18th March, 2016 G.S.R. 326(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (i) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rule (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Police Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Himachal Pradesh, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Police Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:─ 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Police Service (Fixation of cadre Strength) Second Amendment Regulations, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Police Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the schedule, for the heading “Himachal Pradesh” and the entries occurring thereunder, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “HIMACHAL PRADESH Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 52 Director General of Police, Himachal Pradesh (Head of Police Force) 1 Additional Director General of Police SV & ACB 1 Additional Director General of Police, (CID) 1 Additional Director General of Police, Law & Order 1 Additional Director General of Police, Armed Police & Training 1 Inspector General of Police (Crime) 1 Inspector General of Police, SV & ACB 1 Inspector General of Police, Law & Order 1 Inspector General of Police, Intelligence 1 Inspector General of Police, Armed Police 1 3 344(अ) 20.04.83 4 158 18.02.84 5 891 19.11.88 6 537 21.09.91 7 243 28.05.94 8 320(अ) 31.03.95 9 740(अ) 31.12.97 10 96(अ) 27.02.98 11 47 12.01.01 12 89(अ) 16.02.07 13 192(अ) 24.03.09 14 511(अ) 16.06.10 -- 4 of 11 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 Inspector General of Police, Police Academy, Training and Research 1 Inspector General of Police, Welfare & Administration 1 Inspector General of Police, Ranges 3 Inspector General of Police, C & TS Logistics 1 Principal - PTC (Daroh) 1 Deputy Inspector General of Police (Crime) 1 Deputy Inspector General of Police (Intelligence &Security) 1 Deputy Inspector General of Police, SV & ACB 1 Deputy Inspector General of Police, TT & R 1 Deputy Inspector General of Police, NCB (CID) 1 Deputy Inspector General of Police, Cyber Crime (CID) 1 Deputy Inspector General of Police (EOW) 1 Asstt. powers conferred by sub-section (i) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Himachal Pradesh hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Police Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, namely: ─ 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Police Service (Pay) Second Amendment Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Police Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, in schedule II,– in Part A relating to posts carrying pay above the senior scale of pay of the Indian Police Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Himachal Pradesh” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “HIMACHAL PRADESH Director General of Police, Himachal Pradesh (Head of Police Force) Rs. 80000/-(fixed) Additional Director General of Police SV & ACB HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police, (CID) HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police, Law & Order HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Additional Director General of Police, Armed Police & Training HAG Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%) 79,000/- Inspector General of Police (Crime) PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, SV & ACB PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Law & Order PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Intelligence PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Armed Police PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Police Academy, Training and Research PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Welfare & Administration PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, Ranges PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Inspector General of Police, C & TS Logistics PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000/- Principal -
